scripts.test:local: npx bddgen && cross-env ENV=local npx playwright test
scripts.test:recette: npx bddgen && cross-env ENV=recette npx playwright test
scripts.test:prod: npx bddgen && cross-env ENV=prod npx playwright test
scripts.report:clean: npx rimraf allure-results allure-report cucumber-report playwright-report test-results .features-gen
scripts.test:full: npm run report:clean && npm run test && npm run report:generate && npm run report:open
